news.title: China positions AI weather-warning system MAZU as a public good for the Global South, targeting 30 countries in five years
news.description: China used the 2026 World Artificial Intelligence Conference (WAIC) in Shanghai to reframe its AI-driven weather early-warning system, MAZU, from a domestic meteorological tool into an exportable public good aimed at developing countries.
